## Month

Specify the month in `YYYY-MM` format.

## Portfolio Questions

Describe the main portfolio evaluation points.

## Capital Flow Questions

Describe what should be reviewed in contributions, withdrawals, or realized results.

## Mistakes To Revisit

List any known decisions or errors that need review.

## Expected Output

Reference the target monthly review document or template.
